briefs.title: Council to Consider: Declaring April 28 'Day of Mourning for Workers Killed and Injured'
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council will consider a request from the New Westminster & District Labour Council to officially declare April 28 as the 'Day of Mourning for Workers Killed and Injured on the Job,' observe a minute of silence at the April 14, 2026 meeting, and allow a union delegate to present on workplace health and safety issues.
briefs.action_required: Attend the April 14, 2026 Council meeting to hear the workplace safety presentation and observe the moment of silence.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — Day of Mourning delegation presentation
